positive: Stylized minimalist line art design featuring a celestial constellation grouping (e.g., Moon, stars, crescent, minor planetary orbits) integrated with soft, flowing botanical elements like stylized fern fronds and simple olive branches. The composition should be perfectly centered and enclosed within a clean, circular or crest-like border. Use high contrast black ink on a pure white background. The style should mimic elegant, modern Nordic tattoo flash or sophisticated engraving, emphasizing clean silhouettes and perfect negative space. The overall mood is tranquil, whimsical, and timeless. Vector graphics quality, suitable for direct screen printing or embroidery transfer.
negative: blurry, deformed, messy, noisy, text, words, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, poor composition, gradients, smoke, realism
